page: Amazon Web Services x8aedz.24xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing AMD EPYC 9R05 processors running at a clock speed of 5.0 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 3072.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz, which provides 32.0 GB of RAM per core. Additionally, the instance is equipped with 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 75 Gbps.

Benchmark results place this instance in the top tier for both single-core and multi-core CPU performance via stress-ng, as well as memory bandwidth. It achieves 22606.27 GB/sec for cached small-block read-only memory bandwidth and 1058.63 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. The system also demonstrates top-tier performance in database operations, handling 330.98 million Redis SET operations per second, and shows strong capabilities in large language model prompt processing across various model sizes.

Given the massive memory footprint, high-speed DDR5 RAM, and integrated 7.6 TB NVMe instance storage, this server offers a resource-dense profile designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications. While the hardware class represents a premium tier of infrastructure, the consolidation of high-speed compute, massive memory capacity, and local NVMe storage provides qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that would otherwise require distributed clustering. It is highly suited for large-scale in-memory databases, real-time data analytics, software compilation, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Amazon Web Services x8aedz.24xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 96 dedicated physical cores powered by 5.0 GHz AMD EPYC 9R05 processors on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 3072.0 GB of high-speed 6 GHz DDR5 memory, providing 32.0 GB of RAM per core, alongside 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a 75 Gbps baseline network. Running on the Nitro hypervisor, this instance delivers top-tier benchmark performance, including exceptional multi-core CPU execution, high memory bandwidth, and rapid database operations. The combination of massive memory capacity, fast local storage, and high-frequency compute makes this instance highly efficient for resource-dense workloads. It is designed for demanding applications such as large-scale in-memory databases, data analytics, software compilation, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Amazon Web Services x8aedz.24xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 96 AMD EPYC cores, 3072 GB DDR5 RAM, and 7600 GB NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier performance for in-memory databases and data analytics.

tagline: A high-frequency, memory-intensive platform featuring massive DDR5 capacity and local NVMe storage for demanding enterprise database and analytical workloads.

3072 GB of high-speed 6 GHz DDR5 memory providing 32 GB per core.
7600 GB of integrated local NVMe SSD storage.
75 Gbps baseline network bandwidth powered by the Nitro hypervisor.
